channel.title: Security on systools.it
channel.description: Recent content in Security on systools.it

item.title: AD CS AutoEnrollment and CryptoAPI: a real-world case of enrollment blocked by cryptographic middleware
item.description: A domain-joined Windows 11 client was failing to renew its machine certificate for EAP-TLS. The CA was working. The template was correct. The block was local, silent, and caused by a cryptographic middleware intercepting CryptoAPI before certreq could complete the request.
